TAKE MY MONEY! This is how a Transformers movie should be. G1 and full of kind, brave characters full of heart and soul. Now give me this, but as a TV series! Live action, with these graphics. also keep it clean. A movie for adults doesn't have to be filthy. Rediscover the lost art of story telling.  I want to see cybertron before the war and all the politics that lead up to it. No humans. WORLD BUILDING.  Show me what a cybertronian home looks like, show me city streets, show me Megatron and Optimus before they were enemies. Show me starscream the winglord of Vos,  show me Mirage the towerling. Show me Jazz the music lover and his club. Prowl the cop. Show me thundercracker and skywarp and explain just what a trine is.  Show me cybertronian religion. I want to see cybertronian culture,  I want to see temples to Primus and see the giant spark of Primus himself. Also I want to see Megatron as an intelligent and highly thoughtful and purposeful character who chooses his path for legitimate reasons. Make me love this guy and sympathize with him and his choices. Do the same for Prime too. Ultimate goal, you will have fans firmly divided into factions as to who they support because both sides just have darn good arguments and reasons for doing what they do. No more one dimensional characters.

They were still true to the characters to where u knew who they were. But they were in a far more realistic light and not so blocky. They were a perfect representation of an alien tech based humanoid life form. The one thing that threw me off the most was shockwave and soundwave. To much like g1.

This is what I was afraid of when they started to do things write. Over correcting. Like now we get a good story with otherwise less awesome designs. I’m not bashing fans of the old movie from the 80s. Heck the first tf series I ever completed watching growing up was armada and that style was a lot like the old one in terms of blockiness. But u can’t go that literal with a realistic interpretation. They need to be more like if a living creature with an fully functional body structure was made of metal.
